title: Deploy Best-Practice Security Policies Instantly with Transaction Security Policy Accelerator
author: Stephen Noe

sections.heading: Key Takeaways
sections.text: Eliminate manual setup configuration by installing a library of proven, best-practice Transaction Security Policies in seconds.Leverage policies pre-aligned with Salesforce Essential Transaction Security documentation for data protection, access control, and API monitoring.Each policy comes with built-in documentation explaining the specific security risks it addresses and any required setup steps. Salesforce Transaction Security Policies(TSPs) are a powerful way to protect your Salesforce org in real time‌ by ‌monitoring user behavior, enforcing controls, and responding automatically to risky activity. But if you’ve ever tried to implement them, you know the challenge isn’t understanding why they matter‌ — ‌it’s figuring out how to get started. We’re excited to introduceTransaction Security Policy Accelerator, a new Salesforce Labs app now available on the AppExchange. It’s designed to make deploying Transaction Security Policies faster, easier, and more consistent.

sections.heading: The challenge with Transaction Security Policies
sections.text: For customers using Salesforce Shield Event Monitoring, Transaction Security Policies unlock advanced capabilities like: Detecting risky login behaviorPreventing large-scale data exportsMonitoring third-party integrations and API accessEnforcing controls around sensitive or high-risk data Salesforce provides excellent guidance through itsEssential Transaction Security PoliciesHelp documentation, which highlights recommended policies and common security use cases. While the documentation provides a strong framework, implementation usually requires manual configuration in Setup—defining specific events, conditions, actions, and supporting components for every policy. For many teams, that manual effort can slow down adoption.

sections.heading: From guidance to one-click deployment
sections.text: Transaction Security Policy Accelerator bridges the gap between guidance and execution. The app provides a library of best-practice Transaction Security Policies that admins can deploy into their org with a single click. Instead of starting from a blank screen in Setup, admins can install proven, ready-to-use policies in minutes.

sections.heading: What the Transaction Security Policy Accelerator does
sections.text: Built specifically for Salesforce admins and security teams, the app helps you: Deploy best-practice policies in one click:Each policy is fully defined and ready to install, eliminating the need to build from scratch.Leverage proven security use cases:Policies are aligned to common scenarios such as data protection, access control, integrations, and data loss prevention.Understand the “Why”:Every policy includes context explaining the risk it addresses, what triggers it, and any additional setup involved.Maximize Shield and Event Monitoring value: Spend less time building policies and more time protecting your org.

sections.heading: Who should use the Transaction Security Policy Accelerator?
sections.text: The Transaction Security Policy Accelerator is a great fit for: Salesforce admins responsible for org securityArchitects and consultants helping customers adopt Transaction Security PoliciesAnyone looking to operationalize Salesforce security best practices more quickly Whether you’re new to Transaction Security Policies or looking to standardize deployments across environments, the app is designed to reduce friction and accelerate results. Transaction Security Policy Accelerator is available today via Salesforce Labs on theAppExchange. You can view an interactive walkthrough demohere.

raw_html:
Key Takeaways

  • Eliminate manual setup configuration by installing a library of proven, best-practice Transaction Security Policies in seconds.
  • Leverage policies pre-aligned with Salesforce Essential Transaction Security documentation for data protection, access control, and API monitoring.
  • Each policy comes with built-in documentation explaining the specific security risks it addresses and any required setup steps.
This summary was created with AI and reviewed by an editor.

Salesforce Transaction Security Policies (TSPs) are a powerful way to protect your Salesforce org in real time‌ by ‌monitoring user behavior, enforcing controls, and responding automatically to risky activity. But if you’ve ever tried to implement them, you know the challenge isn’t understanding why they matter‌ — ‌it’s figuring out how to get started.

We’re excited to introduce Transaction Security Policy Accelerator, a new Salesforce Labs app now available on the AppExchange. It’s designed to make deploying Transaction Security Policies faster, easier, and more consistent.

The challenge with Transaction Security Policies

For customers using Salesforce Shield Event Monitoring, Transaction Security Policies unlock advanced capabilities like:

  • Detecting risky login behavior
  • Preventing large-scale data exports
  • Monitoring third-party integrations and API access
  • Enforcing controls around sensitive or high-risk data

Salesforce provides excellent guidance through its Essential Transaction Security Policies Help documentation, which highlights recommended policies and common security use cases. While the documentation provides a strong framework, implementation usually requires manual configuration in Setup—defining specific events, conditions, actions, and supporting components for every policy.

For many teams, that manual effort can slow down adoption.

From guidance to one-click deployment

Transaction Security Policy Accelerator bridges the gap between guidance and execution.

The app provides a library of best-practice Transaction Security Policies that admins can deploy into their org with a single click. Instead of starting from a blank screen in Setup, admins can install proven, ready-to-use policies in minutes.

What the Transaction Security Policy Accelerator does

Built specifically for Salesforce admins and security teams, the app helps you:

  • Deploy best-practice policies in one click: Each policy is fully defined and ready to install, eliminating the need to build from scratch.
  • Leverage proven security use cases: Policies are aligned to common scenarios such as data protection, access control, integrations, and data loss prevention.
  • Understand the “Why”: Every policy includes context explaining the risk it addresses, what triggers it, and any additional setup involved.
  • Maximize Shield and Event Monitoring value: Spend less time building policies and more time protecting your org.

Who should use the Transaction Security Policy Accelerator?

The Transaction Security Policy Accelerator is a great fit for:

  • Salesforce admins responsible for org security
  • Architects and consultants helping customers adopt Transaction Security Policies
  • Anyone looking to operationalize Salesforce security best practices more quickly

Whether you’re new to Transaction Security Policies or looking to standardize deployments across environments, the app is designed to reduce friction and accelerate results.

Transaction Security Policy Accelerator is available today via Salesforce Labs on the AppExchange. You can view an interactive walkthrough demo here.
